root_text.an4.54:2.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, chavo chavāya saddhiṁ saṁvasati.
root_text.an4.54:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, sāmiko hoti pāṇātipātī adinnādāyī kāmesumicchācārī musāvādī pisuṇavāco pharusavāco samphappalāpī abhijjhālu byāpannacitto micchādiṭṭhiko dussīlo pāpadhammo maccheramalapariyuṭṭhitena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati akkosakaparibhāsako samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ;
root_text.an4.54:2.3: bhariyāpissa hoti pāṇātipātinī adinnādāyinī kāmesumicchācārinī musāvādinī pisuṇavācā pharusavācā samphappalāpinī abhijjhālunī byāpannacittā micchādiṭṭhikā dussīlā pāpadhammā maccheramalapariyuṭṭhitena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati akkosikaparibhāsikā samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ.
root_text.an4.54:2.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, chavo chavāya saddhiṁ saṁvasati.
root_text.an4.54:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, chavo deviyā saddhiṁ saṁvasati?
root_text.an4.54:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, sāmiko hoti pāṇātipātī …pe… micchādiṭṭhiko dussīlo pāpadhammo maccheramalapariyuṭṭhitena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati akkosakaparibhāsako samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ;
root_text.an4.54:3.3: bhariyā khvassa hoti pāṇātipātā paṭiviratā adinnādānā paṭiviratā kāmesumicchācārā paṭiviratā musāvādā paṭiviratā pisuṇāya vācāya paṭiviratā pharusāya vācāya paṭiviratā samphappalāpā paṭiviratā anabhijjhālunī abyāpannacittā sammādiṭṭhikā sīlavatī kalyāṇadhammā vigatamalamaccherena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati anakkosikaparibhāsikā samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ.
root_text.an4.54:3.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, chavo deviyā saddhiṁ saṁvasati.
root_text.an4.54:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, devo chavāya saddhiṁ saṁvasati?
root_text.an4.54:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, sāmiko hoti pāṇātipātā paṭivirato adinnādānā paṭivirato kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato musāvādā paṭivirato pisuṇāya vācāya paṭivirato pharusāya vācāya paṭivirato samphappalāpā paṭivirato anabhijjhālu abyāpannacitto sammādiṭṭhiko sīlavā kalyāṇadhammo vigatamalamaccherena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati anakkosakaparibhāsako samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ;
root_text.an4.54:4.3: bhariyā khvassa hoti pāṇātipātinī …pe… micchādiṭṭhikā dussīlā pāpadhammā maccheramalapariyuṭṭhitena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati akkosikaparibhāsikā samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ.
root_text.an4.54:4.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, devo chavāya saddhiṁ saṁvasati.
root_text.an4.54:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, devo deviyā saddhiṁ saṁvasati?
root_text.an4.54:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, sāmiko hoti pāṇātipātā paṭivirato …pe… sammādiṭṭhiko sīlavā kalyāṇadhammo vigatamalamaccherena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati anakkosakaparibhāsako samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ;
root_text.an4.54:5.3: bhariyāpissa hoti pāṇātipātā paṭiviratā …pe… sammādiṭṭhikā sīlavatī kalyāṇadhammā vigatamalamaccherena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati anakkosikaparibhāsikā samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ.
root_text.an4.54:5.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, devo deviyā saddhiṁ saṁvasati.

translation_text.an4.54:1.1: “Mendicants, there are four ways of living together.
translation_text.an4.54:1.3: A male zombie living with a female zombie;
translation_text.an4.54:1.4: a male zombie living with a goddess;
translation_text.an4.54:1.5: a god living with a female zombie;
translation_text.an4.54:1.6: a god living with a goddess.
translation_text.an4.54:2.1: And how does a male zombie live with a female zombie?
translation_text.an4.54:2.2: It’s when the husband kills living creatures, steals, commits sexual misconduct; he uses speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical; and he’s covetous, malicious, and has wrong view. He’s unethical, of bad character, living at home with his heart full of the stain of stinginess, abusing and insulting ascetics and brahmins.
translation_text.an4.54:2.3: And the wife is also … unethical, of bad character …
translation_text.an4.54:2.4: That’s how a male zombie lives with a female zombie.
translation_text.an4.54:3.1: And how does a male zombie live with a goddess?
translation_text.an4.54:3.2: It’s when the husband … is unethical, of bad character …
translation_text.an4.54:3.3: But the wife doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, or commit sexual misconduct. She doesn’t use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. And she’s contented, kind-hearted, with right view. She’s ethical, of good character, living at home with her heart rid of the stain of stinginess, not abusing and insulting ascetics and brahmins.
translation_text.an4.54:3.4: That’s how a male zombie lives with a goddess.
translation_text.an4.54:4.1: And how does a god live with a female zombie?
translation_text.an4.54:4.2: It’s when the husband … is ethical, of good character …
translation_text.an4.54:4.3: But the wife … is unethical, of bad character …
translation_text.an4.54:4.4: That’s how a god lives with a female zombie.
translation_text.an4.54:5.1: And how does a god live with a goddess?
translation_text.an4.54:5.2: It’s when the husband … is ethical, of good character …
translation_text.an4.54:5.3: And the wife is also … ethical, of good character …
translation_text.an4.54:5.4: That’s how a god lives with a goddess.
translation_text.an4.54:5.5: These are the four ways of living together.” …
